name: Hint Surge
description: Unlock one extra hint instantly for any one bug during solving.

name: Time Warp
description: Gain 5 extra minutes for one selected submission.

name: Rollback Shield
description: Protect one scored submission from a penalty adjustment.

name: Double Debug
description: Submit two attempts for one bug and keep the better score.

name: Market Spy
description: Preview one hidden bug detail before full reveal.

name: Safety Net
description: Recover 20% of purchase price on one failed submission.
